# cellForItem(at:)

**Instance Method**

Returns the browser cell for the item at the specified index.

## Declaration

```swift
func cellForItem(at index: Int) -> IKImageBrowserCell!
```

## Parameters

- **index**: The index.

## Return Value

The browser cell at the specified index.

## Discussion

Subclasses must not override this method.

## Getting Item Information

- **indexOfItem(at:)**: Returns the index of the item at the specified location.
- **itemFrame(at:)**: Returns the frame rectangle for the item located at the specified index.
- **visibleItemIndexes()**: Returns the indexes of the view’s currently visible items.
